params.description: Vertical picture graph appears. Swings column has 4 star symbols. Other columns empty. Key visible: Each star = 5.
Data table appears alongside picture graph showing same playground data.

beats.text: It is easier to read this picture graph if you can count by 5s. That's exactly what we do with scale of 5.

elements.description: Vertical picture graph. Swings column has 4 star symbols. Other columns empty. Key: Each star = 5.
Data table showing playground data alongside graph.

beats.text: Let's check: does the picture graph match our data table? 4 symbols, scale of 5. Count by 5s with me… 4 symbols, counting by 5s. What's the total?
What is the total represented by the picture graph?
20 items. 5, 10, 15, 20. Skip counting tells you the total in the picture graph and that matches the value in the data table.
